zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Cobham於1316年出生在英國肯特可巴姆時，她的父親John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham31歲，母親Joan Beauchamp18歲。她於1341年與Philip le Despenser在英國林可爾史爾格爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1357年11月15日之前在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾布洛可萊斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Cobham于1316年出生在英国肯特可巴姆时，她的父亲John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham31岁，母亲Joan Beauchamp18岁。她于1341年与Philip le Despenser在英国林可爾史爾格爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1357年11月15日之前在英国英格兰林可爾史爾，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾布洛可萊斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Cobham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of at least three places in southern England called Cobham, in Kent, Surrey, and Sussex.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Cobham was born in 1316, in Cobham, Kent, England, her father, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, was 31 and her mother, Joan Beauchamp, was 18. She married Philip le Despenser in 1341, in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died before 15 November 1357, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Brocklesby, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Cobham est née en 1316, à Cobham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Beauchamp, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Philip le Despenser en 1341, à Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée avant 15 novembre 1357, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Brocklesby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Cobham 1316 in Cobham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham 31 und ihre Mutter Joan Beauchamp 18. Sie hat 1341 in Goxhill, Lincolnshire, England Philip le Despenser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb vor 15. November 1357 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Brocklesby, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Cobhamが1316年にイギリスケントコブハムで生まれた時，父John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobhamは31歳，母Joan Beauchampは18歳であった。1341年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアゴクスヒルでPhilip le Despenserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1357年11月15日以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアブロックレスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Goxhill,,Lincolnshire,England: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노르스 링코실르 고스힐
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Cobham(이)가 1316년 영국 켄트 컵함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Beauchamp(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1341년 영국 링코실르 고스힐에서 Philip le Despenser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1357년 11월 15일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 브록레스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Cobham nasceu em 1316, em Cobham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Beauchamp, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip le Despenser em 1341, em Goxhill, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Goxhill,,Lincolnshire,England: гоксхилл, норт линколншир, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Cobham родилась в 1316 г. в местности кобхам, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Cobham, 2nd Baron Cobham было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Beauchamp, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip le Despenser в 1341 г. в местности гоксхилл, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла перед 15 ноябрь 1357 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности брокклесби, линколншир, Англия.
